name: llm_enrichment_with_real_call
description: Drives the chatbot fixture through the pipeline with a stubbed LLM client. Verifies that the chatbot finding is enriched with a real-looking verdict (not just llm_skipped). This case is LLM-dependent and runs only when MANUSIFT_LLM_EVALS=1 is set; otherwise the runner auto-skips it.
